permission.title: Microphone Permission Required
permission.description: This tuner needs microphone access to detect pitch. All processing happens locally on your device — no audio is uploaded.
permission.deniedHelp: Re-allow microphone access from the lock icon next to the URL, then refresh the page.
permission.unsupported: Microphone API is not supported in this browser. Try the latest Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText: Front-end-only tuner using the YIN algorithm. All processing stays on your device.
